aboard.example: All the passengers are aboard the ship.

acceptable.example: Your work is good and acceptable.
acceptable.example_zh: 你的作品很好，可以接受。

accurate.example: Her answer was quick and accurate.

ache.example: My head aches after a long day.
She has an ache in her back.

achieve.example: She worked hard to achieve her goal.

additional-adj-admire.example: We need additional chairs for the guests.
additional-adj-admire.example_zh: 我們需要為客人多準備椅子。

advanced.example: He is taking an advanced English class.

advantage.example: Being tall is an advantage in basketball.
advantage.example_zh: 在籃球場上長得高是個優勢。

adventure.example: They went on an exciting adventure.
adventure.example_zh: 他們展開了一場刺激的冒險。

advertise.example: The company advertised its new phone on TV.
advertise.example_zh: 這家公司在電視上為新手機打廣告。

advise.example: The doctor advised me to rest.

adviser-advisor.example: My teacher is also my adviser.
adviser-advisor.example_zh: 我的老師也是我的指導老師。

afford.example: I can't afford such an expensive car.

afterward-afterwards.example: We had dinner and went home afterward.
afterward-afterwards.example_zh: 我們吃完晚餐後就回家了。

agriculture.example: Agriculture is important for the country.
agriculture.example_zh: 農業對這個國家很重要。

airline.example: This airline flies to many countries.
airline.example_zh: 這家航空公司飛往許多國家。

alley.example: The cat ran into a dark alley.
alley.example_zh: 那隻貓跑進一條黑暗的小巷。

almond.example: She added almonds to the cake.

alphabet.example_zh: 英文字母共有二十六個。

amaze.example: The magic show amazed the children.
amaze.example_zh: 魔術表演讓孩子們驚嘆不已。

ambition.example: Her ambition is to become a scientist.
ambition.example_zh: 她的志向是成為科學家。

ambulance.example: The ambulance rushed to the hospital.

angel.example: The kind nurse was like an angel.
angel.example_zh: 那位親切的護理師宛如天使。

announce.example: The teacher announced the test results.

anxious.example: She felt anxious before the interview.
He was anxious to start the trip.

anyhow.example: It was hard, but we finished anyhow.
anyhow.example_zh: 雖然很難，但我們還是完成了。

apart.example: The two houses are far apart.

appeal.example: The bright colors appeal to children.
The town has a special appeal.
appeal.example_zh: 這座小鎮有種特別的魅力。

approve.example: My parents approved of my plan.

apron.example: The cook wore a white apron.

armed.example: An armed guard stood at the door.
armed.example_zh: 一名武裝警衛站在門口。

arrest.example: The police made an arrest last night.

ash.example: Only ash was left after the fire.

aside.example: She set the book aside and stood up.
aside.example_zh: 她把書放到一邊站了起來。

assistant.example: The shop assistant helped me choose.

assume.example: I assume you have finished your homework.
assume.example_zh: 我猜你已經寫完功課了。

attitude.example: She has a positive attitude toward life.
attitude.example_zh: 她對人生抱持積極的態度。

attractive.example: The store window was very attractive.
attractive.example_zh: 那家店的櫥窗很吸引人。

audience.example: The audience clapped after the show.

automatic.example: The door is automatic and opens by itself.
automatic.example_zh: 這扇門是自動的，會自己打開。

automobile-auto.example: He works in an automobile factory.
automobile-auto.example_zh: 他在一家汽車工廠工作。

avenue.example: The shop is on a busy avenue.
avenue.example_zh: 那家店在一條繁忙的大街上。

awake.example: I awoke to the sound of birds.

awaken.example: The loud bell awakened the students.
awaken.example_zh: 響亮的鈴聲喚醒了學生。

award.example: She won an award for her painting.
The school awarded him a prize.

aware.example: Are you aware of the danger?

awful.example: The weather was awful all week.

awkward.example: There was an awkward silence in the room.
awkward.example_zh: 房間裡出現尷尬的沉默。

awkward.example: He felt awkward holding the baby.
awkward.example_zh: 他抱著寶寶時顯得很笨拙。

background.example: There are mountains in the background of the photo.

bacon.example: I had eggs and bacon for breakfast.

badly.example: He was badly hurt in the fall.

baggage.example: We checked our baggage at the airport.

bait.example: He used a worm as bait.
She baited the hook with bread.
bait.example_zh: 她在魚鉤上裝了麵包當餌。
